nextRequiredAction: Current PID/HWND movement-gated proof is live validated through ForwardSeries3x250, 1m fixed-bearing A/B waypoint smoke, and 2m fixed-bearing A/B waypoint smoke. The offset-route auto-turn slice remains blocked: the Python turn-key profiler found no promoted turn key/backend candidate across post-message and foreground d/a trials, foreground Left/Right arrow trials before and after the SendInput fix, true SendInput q/e trials, longer 500ms d trials, or true SendInput d trials after the INPUT-size fix. notes: May 8 on-demand coord anchor ProofOnly refresh passed on PID 33912 / HWND 0xE0DB2 at 10:24:55Z; movementSent=false; no CE; no SavedVariables live truth.

May 8 retry-enabled true foreground SendInput Right profile added: Right delivered without fallback twice at 250ms after fresh proof, but yaw delta stayed 0.0 and proof-coordinate delta stayed 0.0; post-profile ProofOnly passed.

May 8 pointer schema guardrail: docs/recovery/current-proof-anchor-readback.json must remain a current-proof pointer containing riftscanCandidateSource.matchFile; do not replace it with a raw proof readback summary.

May 8 targeted keybind-surface search: no plaintext movement binding hits in AppData/Documents configs outside AddOns; binary C:\Program Files (x86)\Glyph\Games\RIFT\Live\codex_keys.dat contains leading W/S/A/D + arrow alternate entries followed by Q/E.

May 8 SendInput root cause fixed: post-rift-key.ps1 INPUT union now includes mouse/hardware variants so cbSize is 40 instead of 32; true foreground SendInput d no-turned at 125ms and 500ms with zero proof-coordinate delta, so d remains unpromoted.

May 8 longer 500ms d profile added to turn-key evidence: foreground-sendinput mode fell back to AutoHotkey and no-turned twice; post-message d produced opposite-sign yaw deltas +10.233 then -10.992 with zero proof-coordinate delta, so it remains unpromoted; post-profile ProofOnly passed.

May 8 foreground-sendinput Left/Right arrow probe added to turn-key profile evidence: exact foreground target, helper fell back to AutoHotkey with exit 0 for both keys, yaw delta 0.0, proof-coordinate delta 0.0, no CE; arrows are also not a promoted turn backend.

May 8 foreground-sendinput d probe added to turn-key profile evidence: exact foreground target, helper fell back to AutoHotkey with exit 0, yaw delta 0.0, proof-coordinate delta 0.0, no CE; still no promoted turn backend.

May 8 Python turn-key profile runner added and live-tested: post-message a produced no turn, post-message d produced one 8.384 degree candidate but then no-turn repeats, so no turn key/backend was promoted; all profiled attempts had zero proof-coordinate movement and no CE.

notes: Candidate readback matched same-time RRAPICOORD1 reference and has since been movement-validated through Forward250, ForwardSeries3x250, 1m fixed-bearing A/B waypoint smoke, and 2m fixed-bearing A/B waypoint smoke on PID 33912.

latestAutoTurnValidation.nextRequiredAction: Treat auto-turn as blocked until the effective live turn key/backend is profiled and proven to change actor-facing reliably; do not allow auto-turn to proceed into forward navigation unless alignment is within threshold after fresh proof.

evidence: Plan-only run verified exact PID 33912 / HWND 0xE0DB2 and emitted no input.
Multi-key live profile: post-message a input succeeded but yaw delta was 0.0 degrees and coordinate delta was 0.0; later attempts failed closed before input when the 60-second proof gate expired.
Single d live profile with per-attempt proof refresh: post-message d produced yaw delta -8.3837 degrees with proof-coordinate delta 0.0, but this was only one candidate and therefore not promoted.
Repeat d live profile with per-attempt proof refresh: both post-message d attempts had yaw delta 0.0 and proof-coordinate delta 0.0, so d was not repeatable enough to promote.

Foreground-sendinput d live profile with exact foreground target and per-attempt proof refresh: SendInput failed and the helper fell back to AutoHotkey with exit 0, yaw delta 0.0 degrees, proof-coordinate delta 0.0, so foreground fallback d was also no-turn and not promotable.

Foreground-sendinput Left/Right live profile with exact foreground target and per-attempt ProofOnly refresh: SendInput failed and the helper fell back to AutoHotkey for both keys with exit 0, both yaw deltas were 0.0 degrees, proof-coordinate delta stayed 0.0, and visual frame comparison changed 6.552%, so arrows are also no-turn and not promotable.

Longer 500ms d live profile with exact foreground target and per-attempt ProofOnly refresh: foreground-sendinput mode fell back to AutoHotkey and no-turned twice; post-message d produced turn-candidate yaw deltas +10.2325 then -10.9922 degrees with zero proof-coordinate delta, but opposite signs mean no repeatable same-direction backend was promoted.

SendInput root cause: post-rift-key.ps1 was passing a 32-byte INPUT structure because the INPUT union only contained KEYBDINPUT; adding MOUSEINPUT/HARDWAREINPUT makes Marshal.SizeOf(INPUT)=40 and resolved LastWin32Error=87 invalid-parameter SendInput failures.
Post-fix true foreground SendInput d profile at 125ms: sendInputFailed=false, autoHotkeyFallbackUsed=false, yaw delta 0.0 degrees, proof-coordinate delta 0.0, so true SendInput d still no-turned.

Post-fix true foreground SendInput d profile at 500ms x2: both attempts had sendInputFailed=false, autoHotkeyFallbackUsed=false, yaw delta 0.0 degrees, proof-coordinate delta 0.0, so true SendInput d is not promotable.

Post-fix true foreground SendInput Left/Right profile at 250ms: Left no-turned twice; Right r1 failed closed before input on ProofOnly reference capture (no usable RRAPICOORD1), then Right r2 delivered with sendInputFailed=false/autoHotkeyFallbackUsed=false and yaw delta 0.0; all completed attempts had proof-coordinate delta 0.0, so arrows are still not promotable.

Targeted keybind-surface search found no plaintext movement binding hits in AppData/Documents configs outside AddOns; binary codex_keys.dat in the RIFT Live folder contains leading W/S/A/D entries paired with arrow alternates followed by Q/E.

Post-fix true foreground SendInput q/e profile at 125ms x2: q and e both delivered with sendInputFailed=false/autoHotkeyFallbackUsed=false, all four yaw deltas were 0.0 degrees, all proof-coordinate deltas were 0.0, so q/e are not promotable turn backends.

Retry-enabled true foreground SendInput Right profile at 250ms x2: proof refresh before each attempt succeeded on try 1; both attempts delivered with sendInputFailed=false and autoHotkeyFallbackUsed=false; yaw delta 0.0 and proof-coordinate delta 0.0 for both attempts, so Right remains unpromoted.

Post-message Left/Right profile at 250ms x2 after restoring the proof pointer: all four per-attempt ProofOnly refreshes passed on try 1; all four key attempts delivered with effectiveMode=post-message; yaw delta 0.0 and proof-coordinate delta 0.0 for every attempt, so post-message arrows remain unpromoted.

A prior post-message arrow attempt failed closed before input because docs/recovery/current-proof-anchor-readback.json had been overwritten with a raw readback summary and no longer contained riftscanCandidateSource.matchFile; restoring the pointer schema fixed ProofOnly.
codeHardening: Added Python scripts/profile_turn_keys.py orchestration for exact PID/HWND turn-key profiling.
Added per-attempt ProofOnly refresh support for slow but fresh proof-gated key trials.
Profiler writes JSON and Markdown summaries, records before/after actor-facing yaw and proof-coordinate readbacks, and fails closed on coordinate movement.
Profiler now records effective input delivery from post-rift-key helper stdout, including foreground SendInput failures and AutoHotkey fallback use.
post-rift-key.ps1 now includes LastWin32Error details when foreground SendInput returns zero inputs.
post-rift-key.ps1 now declares the full INPUT union so SendInput receives the correct 40-byte cbSize on x64.
Validated post-rift-key.ps1 Add-Type layout with Marshal.SizeOf(INPUT)=40, KEYBDINPUT=24, MOUSEINPUT=32.
Added scripts/summarize_turn_key_profiles.py to produce compact Markdown/JSON evidence tables across turn-key profile summaries.
Turn-key profiler supports --proof-refresh-retries; the retry-enabled Right profile configured one extra proof-refresh try but did not need it because both refreshes passed first try.

Added scripts/test_current_proof_pointer.py to guard that docs/recovery/current-proof-anchor-readback.json remains a current-proof pointer with riftscanCandidateSource.matchFile instead of a raw readback summary.
latestTurnKeyProfileValidation.nextRequiredAction: Do not re-run auto-turn-to-forward until a turn backend is promoted. True foreground SendInput d, arrows, q/e, retry-enabled Right, and post-message Left/Right all no-turn; post-message d can move yaw but remains inconsistent/opposite-sign. Next inspect actual in-client keybind semantics/UI state or discover a non-keyboard turn surface before more keyboard experiments.
